headline: Assessing ServiceNow (NOW) Valuation After A Year Of Sharp Share Price Declines
summary: What recent performance signals about ServiceNow stock ServiceNow (NOW) has seen mixed share performance recently, with the stock down about 31% year to date and about 50% over the past year, despite positive annual revenue and net income growth. For context, the company reports annual revenue of US$13.96b and net income of US$1.76b. These results are supported by its workflow software platform across IT, customer service, HR, and security use cases in multiple regions. See our latest...

headline: After a 50% Drop, Is ServiceNow Stock Worth Buying?
summary: Less than a year ago, ServiceNow stock (NYSE: NOW) was a market darling trading at over $211 a share. Today, it’s hovering around $102. That’s a massive 50% haircut from its peak, even though the actual business hasn’t missed a beat—growing revenues at 20% year after year.

headline: ServiceNow (NOW) Stock Trades Up, Here Is Why
